title: Intense Velvety Dutch Haggis Stew
description: A sour and velvety Dutch dish featuring haggis, perfect for a weeknight dinner, and friendly to dairy-free diets.

ingredients.name: haggis
ingredients.notes: traditional Scottish dish made from sheep's heart, liver, and lungs, mixed with onion, oatmeal, and spices

instructions: Heat the olive oil in the pressure cooker over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until it is translucent.
Add the chopped carrots and potatoes, and cook for 5 minutes.
Add the haggis, vegetable broth, apple cider vinegar, tomato paste, salt, and black pepper to the pressure cooker.
Stir well to combine, then close the lid of the pressure cooker.
Cook at high pressure for 20 minutes.
Let the pressure release naturally for 10 minutes, then quick-release any remaining pressure.
Open the lid and check that the vegetables are tender, then serve hot.
